title: To protect physicians and other health care professionals who use automated external defibrillators in the scope of their practice or employment against civil liability when the automatic external defibrillator malfunctions.
description: To protect physicians and other health care professionals who use automated external defibrillators in the scope of their practice or employment against civil liability when the automatic external defibrillator malfunctions.

title: To extend good samaritan protections to persons or entities that include an opioid antagonist within a cabinet containing an automatic external defibrillator.
